channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Two U.S. Troops Killed in Iranian Missile Attack on Jordan
item.description: Two U.S. service members were killed and more wounded in an Iranian ballistic missile attack on an airbase in Jordan on Saturday, military officials said.

item.title: GOP midterms strategy: Make it a "hate election"
item.description: Republicans admit the GOP's midterm forecast is bleak. But they're clinging to two hopes: voters' fear and loathing of Democrats. "It's going to be a ...

item.title: Gas prices are rising again â and so is GOP grief in the midterms
item.description: Just when Republicans thought they'd caught a break on gas prices, the collapse of President Trump's Iran deal is derailing their best chance to chang...

item.title: Trump's DOJ turns to a never-used court for its next deportation fight
item.description: The Justice Department is asking a never-before-used federal court to remove an unnamed noncitizen, the first use of a 30-year-old process that could ...
